reasoning: High uplink packet loss on the E2 interface is a hard error that precedes and causes volumetric degradation, affecting O-DU, O-CU, and RICs.
actionable_steps: 1. Transport Layer Audit: Inspect physical/virtual transport network between O-DU and Near-RT RIC. 2. O-DU Interface Check: Verify E2 agent configuration and hardware health. 3. RIC Connectivity: Validate Near-RT RIC ingress capacity.
